text.message: So brutal to 7 out early game
May as well be in the desert
Pointless city cos they don't roll haha
You can t cry any more green
Honestly I think it's blue still
how is green not winning tho?
he went after me last game too
before the first roll even started
i already told you i will sign you the t shirt
better i take road or oj wins
oj you road settle, we see you
Why rob me when you have army
you have 3 devs to get back
we know, and that s the pb
Oj you need to fight road if you can
I need to win back army then get 3 vps
it was hard to win the army back
I promise you I am nowhere close
Playing devs to prove it haha
you can, you still have your 2 vps ;-)
